observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with tool damage
Visual pattern suggesting cut through inner insulation layer
Localized deviation from normal cable appearance
mechanism_explanation: Worn or misaligned tooling causes unintended cuts or marks on the workpiece.
severity_visual_description: critical cut through inner insulation layer visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace worn tooling and reduce tool change intervals.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the cut through inner insulation layer would be absent and surface appears normal.
